dialogue_text: It is kind of you to like a Scarecrow,
source_excerpt: "It is kind of you to like a Scarecrow," he replied. "But surely you will think more of me when you hear the splendid thoughts my new brain is going to turn out." Then he said good-bye to them all in a cheerful voice and went to the Thro...
